title: Best VPN for Denmark 2026: Top Picks for Privacy and Streaming
description: The best VPNs for Denmark in 2026, tested for speed, privacy, and streaming. NordVPN, ExpressVPN, and Mullvad compared for Danish users, with notes on Danish data retention laws.
content:
Quick answer: Denmark has strong baseline privacy protections, but ISPs must log connection metadata under EU data retention rules. NordVPN is the top choice for most Danish users: fast Copenhagen-area servers, Panama jurisdiction outside EU data retention, and reliable streaming unblocking. Mullvad is the best option for users who want maximum anonymity with no account required.

Do You Need a VPN in Denmark?

Denmark ranks among the most internet-free countries in the world. There is no government censorship of websites and no mass surveillance comparable to some other European countries. However, a VPN still offers practical benefits from Denmark:

  • ISP data retention: Danish law, implementing EU directives, requires ISPs to log connection metadata. This means your ISP knows which servers you connect to and when, even if they cannot see the content. A VPN prevents this logging by routing your traffic through an encrypted server.
  • Streaming access: US Netflix has a significantly larger content library than Danish Netflix. BBC iPlayer is UK-only. A VPN lets you access these libraries as if you were connecting from the relevant country.
  • Public Wi-Fi security: Danish airports, hotels, and cafes run the same unencrypted networks found everywhere. A VPN encrypts your connection and prevents other users on the network from intercepting your data.
  • Travel from Denmark: When traveling to countries with more restrictive internet policies, a VPN configured before departure ensures continued access to your usual services.

Best VPNs for Denmark in 2026

1. NordVPN

NordVPN is the most popular VPN in Scandinavia and performs exceptionally well for Danish users. Key advantages include servers in Copenhagen and throughout the Nordic region for fast local speeds, a Panama jurisdiction that falls outside EU data retention requirements, the NordLynx protocol (WireGuard-based) for best-in-class speeds, and consistent unblocking of US Netflix, BBC iPlayer, Disney+, and Max. Pricing starts around 3.69 euros per month on a two-year plan. The combination of speed, streaming reliability, and jurisdiction makes NordVPN the strongest all-around choice for Danish users.

2. ExpressVPN

ExpressVPN has servers in Copenhagen and delivers reliably fast connections for Danish users. It is the most consistent performer for streaming, particularly on platforms that actively block VPNs. British Virgin Islands jurisdiction. More expensive than NordVPN (typically 6 to 8 euros per month on long-term plans) but delivers the best streaming reliability on difficult platforms. Best for users who prioritize streaming reliability over cost.

3. Mullvad

Mullvad is a Swedish VPN built for maximum privacy. No email address is required to sign up: you receive an account number and can pay with cash or Monero for complete anonymity. Flat price of 5 euros per month with no long-term commitment required. RAM-only servers, open-source apps, and regular independent security audits. Based in Sweden (EU jurisdiction), but Mullvad has a long-established no-logs policy that has been independently verified. Best for users who prioritize privacy guarantees over streaming access.

4. Surfshark

Surfshark allows unlimited simultaneous connections, making it a good choice for households with many devices. Netherlands jurisdiction. Fast WireGuard protocol, reliable Netflix unblocking, and significantly cheaper than NordVPN on long-term plans. Good budget option for Danish users who want VPN coverage across all family devices.

Danish Data Retention Law

Denmark implemented the EU Data Retention Directive, requiring telecommunications providers to retain records of who connected to what IP address and when. This metadata is accessible to law enforcement. VPN providers based outside the EU (NordVPN in Panama, ExpressVPN in the British Virgin Islands) are not subject to Danish or EU data retention orders. Even if authorities request user data, a provider with a verified no-logs policy has nothing to hand over.

VPN Legality in Denmark

VPNs are fully legal in Denmark. There are no restrictions on their use and no registration requirements. Danish citizens and residents may use VPNs freely for any lawful purpose. This includes accessing foreign streaming content, which, while it may technically violate streaming platform terms of service, carries no legal risk in Denmark for individual users.
